data.description:

The latest update is out from Dalata Hotel ( (GB:DAL) ).

Dalata Hotel Group PLC has received a notification of major holdings from UBS Group AG, indicating a change in their voting rights and financial instrument holdings. UBS Group AG’s voting rights in Dalata increased to 4.38% as of February 12, 2025, reflecting a shift in the ownership structure, which could influence the company’s strategic decisions and impact stakeholders’ interests.

More about Dalata Hotel

Dalata Hotel Group PLC operates in the hospitality industry, primarily focusing on hotel management and operations. It offers accommodation and related services, targeting both business and leisure travelers.

data.title: China Health Industries Delays Quarterly Report
data.description:
China Health Industries Holdings ( (CHHE) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

China Health Industries Holdings has announced a delay in filing its Form 10-Q (Quarter Report) for the period ending December 31, 2024. The primary reason for the delay is the time constraints associated with compiling, disseminating, and reviewing the necessary information, which has made timely filing impractical without undue hardship and expense. The company anticipates filing the report within five calendar days following the original due date of February 14, 2025. No significant changes in financial results are expected for this reporting period. The notification ends with ongoing compliance efforts being noted and is signed by Xin Sun, the company’s CEO and CFO.

More about China Health Industries Holdings

data.description:

Jasper Investments ( (SG:FQ7) ) has issued an update.

Salt Investments Limited has reported on its progress towards exiting the watch-list, highlighting the completion of a strategic acquisition and business diversification efforts approved at an Extraordinary General Meeting. The company has begun integrating financial reporting for a newly acquired subsidiary and has announced significant acquisitions to enhance financial reporting. These efforts are part of a broader strategy to improve the company’s financial health and meet regulatory requirements for removal from the watch-list.

More about Jasper Investments

Salt Investments Limited, a company incorporated in Singapore, operates as a group with subsidiaries focusing on strategic acquisitions, business diversification, and digital transformation. The company is currently on the watch-list due to consecutive financial losses and low market capitalization, and it is actively working towards meeting the exit criteria.

data.title: RUSAL Announces Bond Interest Payments for Fifth Coupon Period
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

United Co RUSAL ( (HK:0486) ) has shared an update.

United Company RUSAL announced the payment of interest on its non-documentary interest-bearing non-convertible exchange-traded bonds, specifically the BO-001P-10 series, for the fifth coupon period ending February 14, 2025. The total payment amounts to 191.1 million Russian rubles, equating to 19.11 rubles per bond, calculated using the Bank of Russia’s key rate plus a premium. This financial move reflects the company’s ongoing obligations to bondholders and underscores its financial strategies in managing its securities, potentially impacting its market position and investor relations.

More about United Co RUSAL

United Company RUSAL, incorporated in Jersey and continued in the Russian Federation, is an international public joint-stock company. It operates within the aluminum industry, focusing on the production and trading of aluminum and related products, with a notable presence in various international markets.

data.title: Foresight Autonomous Expands Safety Solutions with Japanese Partnership
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

Foresight Autonomous Holdings ( (FRSX) ) has provided an announcement.

On February 14, 2025, Foresight Autonomous Holdings Ltd. announced a development service agreement with a leading Japanese manufacturer of road traffic and hazard management products. This collaboration, facilitated by Cornes Technologies Limited, aims to implement Foresight’s advanced 3D perception system to enhance road safety and efficiency through real-time hazard monitoring, especially in challenging conditions. The agreement is expected to accelerate Foresight’s revenue growth and improve its industry positioning by providing innovative solutions for road safety.

More about Foresight Autonomous Holdings

Foresight Autonomous Holdings Ltd. is a technology company specializing in developing smart multi-spectral vision software solutions and cellular-based applications. Through its subsidiaries, Foresight Automotive Ltd., Foresight Changzhou Automotive Ltd., and Eye-Net Mobile Ltd., the company focuses on creating both ‘in-line-of-sight’ vision systems and ‘beyond-line-of-sight’ accident-prevention solutions. Its products cater to various markets like automotive, defense, autonomous vehicles, and heavy industrial equipment, enhancing road safety and situational awareness with advanced AI technology and analytics.

data.title: Evaxion Biotech Secures Nasdaq Compliance, Strengthens Financial Position
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

An announcement from Evaxion Biotech ( (EVAX) ) is now available.

On February 14, 2025, Evaxion Biotech announced that Nasdaq confirmed its full compliance with the minimum stockholders’ equity requirement, withdrawing the previous delisting determination. This development follows Evaxion’s successful capital market activities that bolstered its equity and extended its cash runway to mid-2026. The company’s equity position is expected to further improve with the anticipated conversion of its EIB loan to equity in the first quarter of 2025, solidifying its financial stability and enabling it to focus on its strategic milestones for the year.

More about Evaxion Biotech

Evaxion Biotech A/S is a pioneering TechBio company based in Denmark that specializes in developing vaccines powered by AI-Immunology™. The company leverages its proprietary AI prediction models to create novel immunotherapies targeting cancer, bacterial diseases, and viral infections, with a focus on addressing high unmet medical needs.

data.title: Xiamen Yan Palace Issues Profit Warning Amid Strategic Investments
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

Xiamen Yan Palace Bird’s Nest Industry Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:1497) ) has provided an announcement.

Xiamen Yan Palace Bird’s Nest Industry Co., Ltd. announced a profit warning for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2024. Despite an anticipated revenue increase of up to 7%, the company expects a 15% to 25% decrease in net profit compared to the previous year. This decline is attributed to investments in strategic branding with notable celebrity endorsements, the establishment of a new green intelligent factory, and a shift in consumer spending patterns from offline to online channels. These efforts are aimed at long-term growth, though they have temporarily impacted profitability.

More about Xiamen Yan Palace Bird’s Nest Industry Co., Ltd. Class H

Xiamen Yan Palace Bird’s Nest Industry Co., Ltd. operates in the bird’s nest industry, focusing on high-end branding and the development of supply chain capacity. The company aims to enhance its market presence through strategic branding initiatives and an expansion of its production capabilities.

data.title: American Axle Reports Solid 2024 Financial Results
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

An announcement from American Axle ( (AXL) ) is now available.

American Axle & Manufacturing Holdings, Inc. (AAM) reported its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year 2024, showing a solid growth in Adjusted EBITDA driven largely by operational performance. The company experienced a net loss in the fourth quarter, but achieved a net income for the full year 2024, reflecting a shift from a previous net loss in 2023. AAM’s sales decreased in the fourth quarter compared to 2023, impacted by volume and mix, but sales for the full year 2024 increased slightly. Looking ahead to 2025, AAM aims to optimize its core business and complete its announced combination with the Dowlais Group, projecting sales between $5.8 to $6.05 billion and an Adjusted EBITDA of $700 to $760 million.

More about American Axle

As a leading global Tier 1 Automotive and Mobility Supplier, American Axle & Manufacturing Holdings, Inc. (AAM) designs, engineers, and manufactures driveline and metal forming technologies to support electric, hybrid, and internal combustion vehicles. Headquartered in Detroit, AAM operates over 75 facilities in 16 countries, focusing on creating a safer and more sustainable future.
